name: Open Dual Ring
searchText: open-dual-ring open dual ring spinners open-source open-pack-2026 ring spinner dual html css react cssonly customizable popular singleelement
previewCss: .darma-loader-open-dual-ring{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;border:5px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#2563eb) 16%,transparent);border-top-color:var(--loader-color,#2563eb);border-bottom-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#f97316);animation:darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin var(--loader-speed,.9s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-dual-ring:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10px;border-radius:inherit;border:4px solid transparent;border-left-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#f97316);border-right-color:var(--loader-color,#2563eb);animation:darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin calc(var(--loader-speed,.9s)*1.45) linear infinite reverse}@keyframes darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

code.css: .darma-loader-open-dual-ring{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;border:5px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#2563eb) 16%,transparent);border-top-color:var(--loader-color,#2563eb);border-bottom-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#f97316);animation:darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin var(--loader-speed,.9s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-dual-ring:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10px;border-radius:inherit;border:4px solid transparent;border-left-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#f97316);border-right-color:var(--loader-color,#2563eb);animation:darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin calc(var(--loader-speed,.9s)*1.45) linear infinite reverse}@keyframes darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
